# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: |
          npm run build
          mkdir -p ./artifacts
          cp -r dist/* ./artifacts/

  deploy-to-dev:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v1
        with:
          name: artifacts
          path: ./artifacts/

      - name: Execute deployment scripts for dev environment
        run: |
          npm run deploy-dev
          cp -r ./artifacts/* /path/to/dev/environment

  deploy-to-prod:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v1
        with:
          name: artifacts
          path: ./artifacts/

      - name: Execute deployment scripts for prod environment
        run: |
          npm run deploy-prod
          cp -r ./artifacts/* /path/to/prod/environment

  prevent-cicd-security:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Prevent CICD security
        run: |
          echo "CICD security is prevented"
